Bash(sleep 75 && curl -s "https://www.googleapis.com/pagespeedonline/v5/runPagespeed?url=https://tawittytc.github.io/mywebsite/&strategy=mobile" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if 'error' in d:
    print\('API ERROR:', d['error']['message']\)
else:
    cats=d['lighthouseResult']['categories']
    audits=d['lighthouseResult']['audits']
    print\('=== MOBILE ==='\)
    print\('Performance:', cats['performance']['score']*100\)
    print\('FCP:', audits['first-contentful-paint']['displayValue']\)
    print\('LCP:', audits['largest-contentful-paint']['displayValue']\)
    print\('TBT:', audits['total-blocking-time']['displayValue']\)
    print\('CLS:', audits['cumulative-layout-shift']['displayValue']\)
    print\('Speed Index:', audits['speed-index']['displayValue']\)
")
Bash(sleep 45 && curl -s "https://tawittytc.github.io/mywebsite/" | grep -o 'fetchpriority\\|defer src\\|rel="preload"' | sort | uniq -c)

Bash(curl -s "https://www.googleapis.com/pagespeedonline/v5/runPagespeed?url=https://tawittytc.github.io/mywebsite/&strategy=mobile" | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if 'error' in d:
    print\('API Error:', d['error']['message']\)
else:
    cats=d['lighthouseResult']['categories']
    audits=d['lighthouseResult']['audits']
    print\('=== MOBILE ==='\)
    print\('Performance:', int\(cats['performance']['score']*100\)\)
    print\('FCP:', audits['first-contentful-paint']['displayValue']\)
    print\('LCP:', audits['largest-contentful-paint']['displayValue']\)
    print\('TBT:', audits['total-blocking-time']['displayValue']\)
    print\('CLS:', audits['cumulative-layout-shift']['displayValue']\)
    print\('Speed Index:', audits['speed-index']['displayValue']\)
" 2>&1)
